scenario.zh: 機艙溫度過高觸發保護跳機,機組停轉。
scenario.en: Nacelle over-temperature tripped the unit offline.

label.zh: 派員登塔檢查冷卻、找根因再復歸
label.en: Send crew to check cooling, fix root cause, then reset

feedback.zh: ✓ 正解:先排除過熱根因再復歸,避免反覆跳機。
feedback.en: ✓ Find the root cause before reset to avoid repeat trips.

label.zh: 遠端強制復歸、繼續運轉

feedback.zh: ✗ 未排除根因強制復歸,恐再跳機甚至損壞。
feedback.en: ✗ Forcing reset without fixing the cause risks damage.

scenario.zh: SCADA 顯示齒輪箱油溫近兩週緩升,尚未告警。
scenario.en: SCADA shows gearbox oil temp slowly rising over two weeks, no alarm yet.

label.zh: 提前安排換油與濾芯檢查
label.en: Schedule oil change & filter check early

feedback.zh: ✓ 預知保養:趨勢即介入,避免演變成停機。
feedback.en: ✓ Predictive: act on the trend before it becomes downtime.

feedback.zh: ✗ 錯失預兆,後續恐釀大修。
feedback.en: ✗ Missing the precursor can lead to a major overhaul.
